top_signals.title: Alkegen Plans Prepackaged Bankruptcy in Deal for Fresh Cash
top_signals.summary: Alkegen has signed a restructuring deal with lenders that will inject the specialty materials maker with new money and slash its debt load by about $3.1 billion, according to a person familiar with the situation.
